prompt:
Goal: Create a luxury Mediterranean summer travel collage for French Riviera, combining a sunset seaside promenade background with a stylish fashion editorial layout.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, warm golden-hour lighting, cinematic vacation mood, high-resolution photorealistic style.

Layout: Use exactly 5 distinct photo elements layered over one continuous seaside background: 1 large full-body cutout subject on the left and 4 rounded-rectangle inset photos stacked on the right. The main subject should have a thick white sticker-like outline and subtle drop shadow. The 4 right-side inset photos should have large rounded corners and overlap slightly in a clean magazine-collage arrangement.

Main subject: A glamorous young woman with long dark brown hair walking along a stone waterfront promenade at sunset. She wears a flowing sleeveless wrap maxi dress with a deep V neckline, high slit, and ornate orange, teal, cream, and blue paisley pattern. She carries a woven straw handbag and a wide-brim hat in one hand, wearing gold jewelry, bracelets, earrings, and a necklace. Her hair blows in the sea breeze. Place a simple soft-edged brown blur rectangle over her face for anonymized editorial privacy.

Background: A sunlit coastal harbor with turquoise sea, rocky shore, moored yachts, stone walkway, elegant seaside villas, and the sun low on the horizon reflecting across the water. The color palette is peach, coral, turquoise, cream, and warm gold.

Right-side inset photos, exactly 4: 1) Top wide rounded rectangle: coastal cliff and turquoise sea at sunset with the same woman in a coral-orange dress near the right side, face covered by a soft brown blur rectangle. 2) Second wide rounded rectangle: narrow Mediterranean street with peach and terracotta buildings, flowering bougainvillea, warm lamps, and the woman in a coral-orange dress centered, face blurred. 3) Third wide rounded rectangle: marina scene viewed from a yacht deck, yachts in the background, the woman seated in a coral-orange dress holding a drink, shown in profile, face not clearly visible. 4) Bottom wide rounded rectangle: close-up windy seaside portrait with ocean and sunset behind her, hair blowing across the frame, face covered by a larger soft brown blur rectangle.

Visual style: Photorealistic luxury travel advertising, fashion influencer mood board, warm sunset glow, polished Instagram carousel aesthetic, clean layering, no visible text, no logos, no watermark.
